executives.name: Paul Mann
executives.background: Mr. Mann has served as our Chairman and Chief Executive Officer since September 2021. He has over 20 years of experience in the investment management industry and has served as a portfolio manager and analyst at various investment firms. He was previously the CFO of PolarityTE, Inc.

executives.name: Bob Fogarty
executives.background: Mr. Fogarty has served as our Chief Financial Officer since June 2022. He has over 30 years of experience in finance and accounting, including serving as CFO for several public and private companies.

executives.name: Hendrik Strydom
executives.background: Dr. Strydom has served as our Chief Technology Officer since September 2021. He has extensive experience in the development and commercialization of isotope separation technologies.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Mann
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of ASP Isotopes Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Duncan Moore
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Moore has served as a director since 2022. He is a partner at East West Capital Partners and has extensive experience in the healthcare and life sciences sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Josh Donfeld
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Donfeld has served as a director since 2022. He has over 20 years of experience in the investment industry, including roles at Soros Fund Management and Canyon Partners.

board_of_directors.name: Mike Sheridan
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Sheridan has served as a director since 2022. He has extensive experience in the energy and natural resources sectors.

sources.source_description: ASP Isotopes Inc. Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
